pkgmetadata.longdescription: pymorphy2-dicts-ruRussian dictionaries for pymorphy2_... _pymorphy2 httpsgithub.comkmikepymorphy2Installation------------Install pip install pymorphy2-dicts-ruUsage-----To use these dictionaries with pymorphy2 create MorphAnalyzerwith langru parameter import pymorphy2 morph pymorphy2.MorphAnalyzer(langru)To get a path to the installed dictionary data usepymorphy2_dicts_ru.get_path() method.Development-----------The main repo is httpsgithub.comkmikepymorphy2-dicts. The repositorydoesnt contain the data itself only package template and updatescripts are stored in VCS.License for Python code in this package is MIT.The data is licensed underCreative Commons Attribution-Share Alike httpcreativecommons.orglicensesby-sa3.0_.
